Event: Summer Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: M36
Blue Steel Mace

When attacking, has a 40% chance of stunning an enemy for 3 sec.
When the mace's wielder frightens or stuns an enemy unit, they also remove 4 random positive effects from each of the enemy units, and deal 813000 physical damage to them.

Once in a while, the unit frightens 4 random enemy units for 3 sec., reduces all their stats by 40% for 3 sec., and makes them unable to receive positive effects for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
